title: Opinion: Opinion | A Humbled Trump Is Now 'Demanding' Help From Friends
summary_full: The Hormuz 'coalition' was never going to take off. Why, after all, would America's allies want to participate in a crisis not of their own making?
summary_public: The Hormuz 'coalition' was never going to take off. Why, after all, would America's allies want to participate in a crisis not of their own making?
